---
title: "Molar Mass App"
format:
  html:
    self-contained: true
    embed-resources: true
number-sections: false
---

## 分子量計算ツール

```{=html}
<div class="app">
  <div class="frame">

    <div class="title">Molar Mass Tool / 分子量計算機</div>

    <input type="text" id="formula" placeholder="化学式を入力　例）Ca(OH)2, NaCl" class="input">
    <button onclick="calcMolarMass()" class="btn">calculate</button>

    <!-- よく使う -->
    <div class="examples-label">例：</div>
    <div class="examples">
      <span onclick="setFormula('NaCl')">NaCl</span>
      <span onclick="setFormula('H2O')">H2O</span>
      <span onclick="setFormula('CaCO3')">CaCO3</span>
      <span onclick="setFormula('Ca(OH)2')">Ca(OH)2</span>
      <span onclick="setFormula('CO2')">CO2</span>
      <span onclick="setFormula('NH3')">NH3</span>
    </div>

    <!-- 結果表示エリア -->
    <div class="result-box">
      <div id="result" class="result">計算結果がここに表示されます</div>
    </div>

    <!-- 濃度変換 -->
    <div class="convert-section">
      <div class="convert-title">濃度変換</div>
      <div style="font-size:18px; color:#c8f7dc; margin-bottom:10px; font-weight:bold;">計算された分子量を使って、単位を　mol/L ↔ mmol/L ↔ g/L ↔ mg/Lに変換しよう</div>
      <div class="convert">
        <input type="number" id="value" placeholder="数値を入力" class="convert-input">
        <select id="unit" class="convert-select">
          <option value="mol">mol/L</option>
          <option value="mmol">mmol/L</option>
          <option value="g">g/L</option>
          <option value="mg">mg/L</option>
        </select>
        <button onclick="convert()" class="convert-btn">変換</button>
      </div>
      <div id="convert-result" class="convert-result"></div>
    </div>

    <!-- 履歴 -->
    <div class="history-title">履歴
      <button onclick="clearHistory()" class="clear-btn">Clear</button>
    </div>
    <div id="history" class="history"></div>

  </div>
</div>

<style>
body { background:#1b2a2f; }

.frame {
  background:#22363c;
  padding:40px;
  border-radius:20px;
  width:720px;
  margin:auto;
}

.title {
  color:#c8f7dc;
  font-size:22px;
  margin-bottom:15px;
}

.input {
  width:100%;
  padding:10px;
  border-radius:10px;
  border:none;
  background:#2e4a50;
  color:white;
}

.btn {
  margin-top:10px;
  width:100%;
  padding:12px;
  border:none;
  border-radius:10px;
  background:#4dd0a7;
  color:#1a2a2f;
  cursor:pointer;
  font-weight:bold;
  transition:background 0.3s ease;
  z-index: 1;
  position: relative;
}

.btn:hover {
  background:#3ab88e;
}

.examples span {
  display:inline-block;
  margin:5px;
  padding:5px 8px;
  background:#2e4a50;
  border-radius:8px;
  cursor:pointer;
  color:#c8f7dc;
}

.examples-label {
  margin-top:10px;
  color:#aaa;
  font-size:12px;
}

.convert-section {
  margin-top:15px;
  background:#1a2a2f;
  padding:15px;
  border-radius:10px;
}

.convert-title {
  color:#4dd0a7;
  font-size:14px;
  margin-bottom:10px;
  font-weight:bold;
}

.convert {
  display:flex;
  gap:5px;
}

.convert-input, .convert-select {
  flex:1;
  padding:8px;
  border-radius:8px;
  border:none;
  background:#2e4a50;
  color:white;
}

.convert-btn {
  padding:8px;
  background:#4dd0a7;
  color:#1a2a2f;
  border:none;
  border-radius:8px;
  cursor:pointer;
  font-weight:bold;
}

.convert-btn:hover {
  background:#3ab88e;
}

.convert-result {
  margin-top:15px;
  color:#c8f7dc;
  font-size:14px;
  font-weight:bold;
  background:rgba(77, 208, 167, 0.1);
  border:1px solid #4dd0a7;
  border-radius:8px;
  padding:15px;
  display:grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap:15px;
}

.result {
  margin-top:15px;
  font-size:28px;
  font-weight:bold;
  color:#4dd0a7;
  text-align:center;
  min-height:80px;
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  justify-content:center;
}

.result-box {
  margin-top:20px;
  background:rgba(77, 208, 167, 0.1);
  border:2px solid #4dd0a7;
  border-radius:10px;
  padding:20px;
  margin-bottom:20px;
}

.history-title {
  margin-top:20px;
  color:#aaa;
}

.history {
  margin-top:10px;
  font-size:14px;
  color:#ddd;
}

.history-title {
  display:flex;
  justify-content:space-between;
  align-items:center;
}

.clear-btn {
  padding:5px 12px;
  font-size:12px;
  background:#e74c3c;
  color:white;
  border:none;
  border-radius:5px;
  cursor:pointer;
}

.clear-btn:hover {
  background:#c0392b;
}
</style>

<script>
// ===== 全元素（主要 + 拡張）=====
const atomicWeights = {
H:1.008, He:4.0026, Li:6.94, Be:9.0122, B:10.81, C:12.011, N:14.007, O:15.999, 
F:18.998, Ne:20.180, Na:22.990, Mg:24.305, Al:26.982, Si:28.085,
P:30.974, S:32.06, Cl:35.45, Ar:39.948, K:39.098, Ca:40.078,
Sc:44.956, Ti:47.867, V:50.942, Cr:51.996, Mn:54.938, Fe:55.845,
Co:58.933, Ni:58.693, Cu:63.546, Zn:65.38, Ga:69.723, Ge:72.630,
As:74.922, Se:78.971, Br:79.904, Kr:83.798, Rb:85.468, Sr:87.62,
Ag:107.868, Cd:112.414, Sn:118.710, I:126.904, Ba:137.327,
Hg:200.592, Pb:207.2, U:238.029
};

// ===== 括弧対応パーサ =====
function parseFormula(formula) {
  let stack = [{}];
  let i = 0;

  while (i < formula.length) {
    if (formula[i] === "(") {
      stack.push({});
      i++;
    }
    else if (formula[i] === ")") {
      i++;
      let num = "";
      while (/\d/.test(formula[i])) num += formula[i++];

      let group = stack.pop();
      let mult = parseInt(num) || 1;

      for (let el in group) {
        stack[stack.length - 1][el] =
          (stack[stack.length - 1][el] || 0) + group[el] * mult;
      }
    }
    else {
      let el = formula[i++];
      if (/[a-z]/.test(formula[i])) el += formula[i++];

      let num = "";
      while (/\d/.test(formula[i])) num += formula[i++];

      let count = parseInt(num) || 1;

      stack[stack.length - 1][el] =
        (stack[stack.length - 1][el] || 0) + count;
    }
  }

  return stack[0];
}

// ===== 計算 =====
function calcMolarMass() {
  const formula = document.getElementById("formula").value.trim();

  if (!formula) {
    document.getElementById("result").innerText = "分子式を入力してください";
    return;
  }

  let parsed = parseFormula(formula);
  let mass = 0;

  for (let el in parsed) {
    if (!atomicWeights[el]) {
      document.getElementById("result").innerText = "エラー: " + el + " は不明な元素です";
      return;
    }
    mass += atomicWeights[el] * parsed[el];
  }

  let text = `<span style="font-weight:bold; color:#c8f7dc; font-size:24px;">${formula}: ${mass.toFixed(3)} g/mol</span>`;
  document.getElementById("result").innerHTML = text;

  // ===== 履歴追加 =====
  let h = document.getElementById("history");
  let item = document.createElement("div");
  item.innerHTML = `${formula} → ${mass.toFixed(3)} g/mol`;
  h.prepend(item);
}

// ===== 濃度変換 =====
function convert() {
  const formula = document.getElementById("formula").value.trim();
  if (!formula) {
    document.getElementById("convert-result").innerText = "エラー：先に分子式を入力してcalculateボタンを押してください";
    return;
  }

  let parsed = parseFormula(formula);
  let mass = 0;

  for (let el in parsed) {
    if (!atomicWeights[el]) {
      document.getElementById("convert-result").innerText = "計算エラー";
      return;
    }
    mass += atomicWeights[el] * parsed[el];
  }

  let value = parseFloat(document.getElementById("value").value);
  let unit = document.getElementById("unit").value;

  if (isNaN(value)) {
    document.getElementById("convert-result").innerText = "値を入力してください";
    return;
  }

  let mol, mmol, g, mg;

  if (unit === "mol") {
    mol = value;
    mmol = mol * 1000;
    g = mol * mass;
    mg = g * 1000;
  } else if (unit === "mmol") {
    mmol = value;
    mol = mmol / 1000;
    g = mol * mass;
    mg = g * 1000;
  } else if (unit === "g") {
    g = value;
    mol = g / mass;
    mmol = mol * 1000;
    mg = g * 1000;
  } else {
    mg = value;
    g = mg / 1000;
    mol = g / mass;
    mmol = mol * 1000;
  }

  let text = `
    <div style="text-align:center;">
      <div style="font-size:14px; color:#aaa; margin-bottom:8px;">入力</div>
      <div style="font-size:20px; font-weight:bold;">${value} ${unit === "mol" ? "mol/L" : unit === "mmol" ? "mmol/L" : unit === "g" ? "g/L" : "mg/L"}</div>
    </div>
    <div style="text-align:center;">
      <div style="border-left: 1px solid #4dd0a7; padding-left:15px;">
        <div style="font-size:14px; color:#aaa; margin-bottom:10px;">変換結果</div>
        <div style="font-size:18px; margin-bottom:8px;">mol/L: ${mol.toFixed(4)}</div>
        <div style="font-size:18px; margin-bottom:8px;">mmol/L: ${mmol.toFixed(2)}</div>
        <div style="font-size:18px; margin-bottom:8px;">g/L: ${g.toFixed(4)}</div>
        <div style="font-size:18px;">mg/L: ${mg.toFixed(2)}</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  `;
  document.getElementById("convert-result").innerHTML = text;
}

// 入力補助（例をクリックしたら入力欄に代入）
function setFormula(f){
  document.getElementById("formula").value = f;
}

// 履歴クリア
function clearHistory() {
  document.getElementById("history").innerHTML = "";
}
</script>
```
